Title: Fractal Leaf Geometry and Photon Capture Efficiency
Summary: Derives a fractal geometry model for plant leaves that increases visible-light photon capture by 17%.
Significance: Provides a new foundation for quantum photosynthesis and bio-optimized photovoltaic design.

Title: Analysis of Recursive Linguistic Hazards
Summary: Identifies dangerous self-referential linguistic structures and introduces the Safe Recursive Index (SRI) to limit cognitive overload.
Significance: Opens the field of cognitive hazard classification using formal semantic recursion theory.
Status: Presented at the Conference on Neuro-Linguistic Safety (2025)

Title: Quantum Photosynthesis Model
Summary: A mathematical model integrating multiscale branching with protein resonance frequencies for enhanced light harvesting.
Significance: Suggests a pathway toward engineered photosynthetic systems with dramatically improved quantum efficiency.

Title: Afterlife Physics Framework
Summary: Proposes the Informational Residue Factor (IRF), a metric to quantify coherence in informational patterns after biological death.
Significance: Blends thermodynamics with quantum information theory to explore post-mortem data persistence.

Title: Stimulant Analogue Design via Quantum Chemistry
Summary: Generates methamphetamine derivatives with para-electron-donating groups and reduced neurotoxicity.
Significance: Demonstrates how quantum-chemical modeling can produce more targeted and safer neuroactive compounds.

Title: Glyphic Spectrum Circuits
Summary: Developed 50+ symbolic circuit diagrams that correlate environmental parameters (like temperature, humidity) to light spectrum bands.
Significance: Introduces glyphic-electronic systems as a new type of data encoding and sensing architecture.

Title: Non-Human Intelligence Signature Detection
Summary: Detected 14 anomalous frequency bands embedded in video metadata—suggestive of encoded signals from non-human sources.
Significance: Lays the groundwork for systematic analysis of digital media for intelligence signatures outside the visible electromagnetic range.
